oidc-command.name: OIDC / SSO
oidc-command.description: Single sign-on gate for the settings area using any OpenID Connect provider. Adds a home-page avatar for the signed-in user.

issuer.label: Issuer URL
issuer.description: Your OpenID Connect issuer. The discovery document is fetched automatically.

clientId.label: Client ID
clientId.description: The client ID registered with your provider.

clientSecret.label: Client Secret
clientSecret.description: Confidential clients send this alongside PKCE. Leave blank only for public clients.

appUrl.label: App URL
appUrl.description: External base URL used to build the redirect URI. Leave blank to derive it from the request.

allowedGroups.label: Allowed groups
allowedGroups.description: Optional allowlist. Requires a groups claim.

allowedRoles.label: Allowed roles
allowedRoles.description: Optional allowlist. Requires a roles claim.

groupsScope.label: Groups scope
groupsScope.description: Extra scope requested when an allowed-groups list is set.

cookieSecret.label: Avatar cookie secret
cookieSecret.description: Optional. Signs the home-page avatar session for stability across restarts.

debug.label: Debug logging
debug.description: Log OIDC flow details to the server console.

oidc.name: OIDC / SSO
oidc.description: Single sign-on gate for the settings area using any OpenID Connect provider. Adds a home-page avatar for the signed-in user.
